concerns.text: Task T029 instructs evaluating projections against `data/processed/occurrence_clean.csv`. The spec (US-3) and plan require a SEPARATE recent occurrence dataset (2005-2020) for evaluation to avoid data leakage. T011 downloads this data, but T029 does not reference it, creating a missing task to load/use the 2005-2020 dataset for evaluation.

Task T010 covers downloading data (FR-001) but lacks a specific task to write the required metadata columns (`source_identifier`, `download_timestamp`, `original_dataset_name`) mandated by Constitution Principle VI. While T015 logs counts, no task explicitly ensures the raw/processed files contain the provenance metadata required by the constitution.

Task T034 implements sensitivity analysis (FR-005) but the description omits the mandatory 'multiple-comparison correction' required by FR-005. The task description only mentions sweeping thresholds, missing the statistical correction component of the requirement.

Task T016 flags species with <100 records as 'INSUFFICIENT_DATA' (FR-006) but applies this check to the historical dataset (1970-2000) after thinning. FR-006 explicitly requires this check on the 2005-2020 test period records. The task covers the wrong dataset for this specific requirement.
